title: Gun Collection: A CGM weapon addon
description: add-on for MrCrayfish's Gun Mod, adds a ton of weapons, ammunition and modules
body:
Gun Collection is an add-on for MrCrayfish's Gun Mod.

This mod provides huge variety of different weapons, ammunition and attachments for everybody's needs. Over 400 guns total! Such number! Huge collection! Craftable! Custom sounds!

0.5.5 was the last update. Big thanks to everyone, who provided help and feedback, that greatly increased mod quality. And great thanks to everyone, who enjoed playing with this mod.

**0.5.5 version features:**
- 403 different craftable weapons for every possible need:
- - Assault rifles
- - SMGs
- - Pistols
- - Shotguns
- - Machineguns
- - Grenade launchers
- - Sniper rifles
- - Prototypes
- - Funny abominations
- - ...and so on
- 46 ammunition types
- 50 modules
- custom sounds
- simple animations
- No overcomplicated out-of-style models
- Modular weapons
- Full EN and RU localisation

**How to use AKV-521:**
1. Craft AKV-521 (7.62) as only available to craft conventionally
2. Craft AKV-521 upper receiver (You need only one)
3. Put both together in standart Minecraft craft table and get AKV-521 with different caliber
4. Repeat

**Want more? Don't like stats? Craving for a specific gun?**
Source code of this addon is open for everyone. You can use it as you want, just mention me somehow. Feel free to do whatever you want with mod files.


**Required dependencies**
MrCrayfish's Gun Mod
Framework
